summary: Iteration 20 - Tested 4 new feature sets: (1) Artist Collaborations (full CRUD + email invites), (2) DSP CSV Import, (3) Share Stats milestones + card, (4) Notification Preferences. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after layout settles (same as iteration 19)

passed_tests: GET /api/collaborations - returns owned and collaborating_on arrays
Collaboration workflow: create invite, verify in owned list, update split, delete
POST /api/analytics/import - imports CSV streaming data (225 events from test CSV)
GET /api/stats/milestones - returns stats and milestones array
GET /api/stats/share-card - returns shareable data with top platforms
Frontend: Collaborations nav link found in sidebar
Frontend: Collaborations page loads with invite form
Frontend: Invite form has all fields (release, name, email, role, split, send button)
Frontend: Existing collaboration displayed (DJ Test, 25% split, pending)
Frontend: Analytics page loads with Import CSV button
Frontend: Share Stats button opens modal
Frontend: Share Stats modal shows stats (3,120 streams, $15.48, 5 releases)
Frontend: Share Stats modal shows top platforms and milestone progress
Frontend: Copy Stats button present in modal
Frontend: Settings page loads with Notifications tab
Frontend: All 8 notification preference toggles present and functional
critical_code_review_comments: Collaboration routes properly handle auth, validation, and split percentage limits (cannot exceed 100%)
Collaboration invite sends both in-app notification and email (via Resend)
CSV import correctly parses date, platform, country, streams, revenue columns and creates stream_events
Share card endpoint aggregates from stream_events with top 3 platforms
Milestones endpoint generates achievement badges based on stream thresholds
Notification preferences have 8 toggles (4 email, 4 push) with proper defaults
seed_data_creation: Test collaboration created and deleted during workflow test. CSV import added 225 stream events.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 tested 4 new feature sets: (1) Artist Collaborations - full CRUD with invite, accept/decline, split updates, and removal. Existing collab: DJ Test on TEST_Playwright_Release at 25% split (pending). (2) DSP CSV Import - POST /api/analytics/import accepts CSV with date,platform,country,streams,revenue,release_title columns. (3) Share Stats - GET /api/stats/milestones returns stats and achievement milestones, GET /api/stats/share-card returns shareable data with top platforms. (4) Notification Preferences - 8 toggles (email_releases, email_collaborations, email_payments, email_marketing, push_releases, push_collaborations, push_payments, push_milestones). Resend API key is configured for real email sending (uses onboarding@resend.dev sender).

mocked_apis.Resend Email: CONFIGURED with real API key - uses onboarding@resend.dev sender
mocked_apis.DSP Streaming Data: SIMULATED - seeded realistic data on startup, CSV import available
mocked_apis.Stripe: Uses test API key (sk_test_emergent) - creates real checkout URLs

dsp_import.accepts: CSV with columns: date, platform, country, streams, revenue, release_title
dsp_import.ui_feature: Import CSV button on Analytics page

notification_preferences.ui_feature: Notifications tab in Settings with 8 toggle switches
